t_ch: 错了，但情有可原，谁会没事去数垃圾桶的数量呢？因此，这个游戏就到此为止吧，太幼稚了！它太幼稚了！
t_en: This is the wrong answer, but it is understandable. Who would count the number of existing trashcans? So, let's stop this game right now. It's too childish! Childish!

t_ch: 错了，但情有可原，谁会没事去数垃圾桶的数量呢？因此，这个游戏就到此为止吧，太幼稚了！它太幼稚了！
t_en: This is the wrong answer, but it is understandable. Who would count the number of existing trashcans? So, let's stop this game right now. It's too childish! Childish!

t_ch: 我怎么知道？这不公平！
t_en: How would I know? This is not fair!

t_ch: 垃圾桶认为你说得对，它同意这确实不公平，谁会没事去数垃圾桶的数量呢？因此，这个游戏就到此为止吧，太幼稚了！它太幼稚了！
t_en: The trashcan thinks you're right, this isn't fair. Who would count the number of existing trashcans? So, let's stop this game right now. It's too childish! Childish!

t_ch: 这是一个垃圾桶，顶盖周圈似乎被人用锐器割开了。
t_en: This is a trashcan, its lid seems to have been cut open with some kind of implement.

t_ch: 打开看看。
t_en: Open it.

t_ch: 你打开了铁桶，一股柴薪燃烧特有的焦味携卷金属冷冽的涩味扑面而来，使你一时窒息。向深不见底的桶底望去，只见无垠的黑暗中，点点未燃尽的薪火在其间闪烁流动——它们还不想早早熄灭。
t_en: You open the tin lid and a waft of burnt wood mixed with cold steel invades your olfactory senses. Looking into the depth of the trashcan, you can see flickers of embers still hanging on, struggling to extend their own lifespan.

t_ch: 这很正常。
t_en: This is normal.

t_ch: 只是一个被切开脑袋的垃圾桶罢了——这种事宇宙里可多的是。「何必和垃圾桶较劲呢？」你如是想着，同伙伴一起离开了。
t_en: It is just a lobotomized trashcan, there are many of them across the universe. "What do I have against trashcans?" You find yourself thinking before leaving with your comrades.

t_ch: 经过这只可怜的邮筒时，你在余光中捕捉到了不属于它的一部分——那是泛黄信封的小小一角，有气无力地挂在了筒口边缘。
t_en: Passing by this pitiful mailbox, you catch a glimmer of what does not belong — the corner of a yellowing envelope hanging limply on the edge of its opening.

t_ch: 拿出来。
t_en: Take it out.

t_ch: 你成功挽救了这个有些脆弱的信封——这可不是一种修辞，而是信封真的在掉渣。纸屑随着矿区特有的烟尘随风而逝，消失在了灼热空气的深处。在彻底化为齑粉之前，你的义举拯救了它。
t_en: You rescue the fragile envelope — this is not a hyperbole, the envelope is disintegrating. The paper scraps crumble into thin air, merging with the unique mine dust, then disappear into the abyss of scorching air. Before its final act of glory, your actions gave it salvation.

t_ch: 推进去。
t_en: Push it in.

t_ch: 你将指腹抵在信封上轻轻施力，便将其推入了邮筒深处的无边混沌与黑暗，接着再没有了声音。它就像坠入深海的石子，入水的那一刻起，便与此世的一切再无关联了。
t_en: You lightly press against the envelope and push it into the dark and unknowable depths of the mailbox. Like a pebble dropped into the ocean, it lost connection with the outside world the moment it vanished into the abyss.

t_ch: 我还有更重要的事。
t_en: I have bigger fish to fry.

t_ch: 你仿佛听到内心深处传来一个阴沉的声音：「何必浪费时间？」随后，另一个甜蜜的声音报以回应：「是啊是啊！」你不知道声音来自何方，但他们无疑很快达成了共识，并帮你做了决定。
t_en: You hear a deep voice resonating deep within your heart. "Why waste the effort?" Another voice follows, "That's right!" You don't know where the voices come from, but they undoubtedly arrived at the same conclusion and made the decision for you.

t_ch: 这里是星际和平播报，观众朋友们晚上好。
t_en: Welcome to the Interastral Peace Broadcast. Good evening everyone.

t_ch: 晚上好。
t_en: Good evening.

t_ch: 「存护」克里珀的巨锤徐徐下落，锤声响彻寰宇，震耳欲聋。
t_en: As Qlipoth the Preservation's giant hammer slowly descends, its strike echoes among the stars with a deafening clamor.

t_ch: 博识学会星空生态学派宣布：琥珀历<unbreak>2157</unbreak>纪结束，<unbreak>2158</unbreak>纪正式到来。
t_en: The Intelligentsia Guild's Astral Ecology School has declared the official end of <unbreak>2157</unbreak> AE and the start of <unbreak>2158</unbreak> AE.

t_ch: 在新的纪元里，星际和平公司将一如既往地致力于银河间的和平共处，贸易繁荣。
t_en: In this new Era, the Interastral Peace Corporation will continue to wholeheartedly support the peaceful co-existence and commercial prosperity of all residents in the galaxy.

t_ch: 公司将不忘初心，牢记创业之初的唯一原则：将一切奉献给「琥珀王」。
t_en: The IPC will remain true to its sole creed upon which it was founded — To dedicate everything to the Amber Lord.

t_ch: 下面让我们回顾在<unbreak>2157</unbreak>琥珀纪发生了哪些重大事件：
t_en: Let's take a moment to look back at some of the biggest happenings in <unbreak>2157</unbreak> AE.

t_ch: 自<unbreak>2147</unbreak>纪开始出现的神秘现象「星核」造成的污染仍在继续。「星核」阻塞了文明之间的道路，令一度团结在「琥珀王」命途下的诸界分崩离析。
t_en: The mysterious phenomenon known as Stellaron corrosion continues to propagate. Stellarons have blocked travel between civilizations since <unbreak>2147</unbreak> AE, and they shattered the union of the worlds that were once united under the Path of the Amber Lord.

t_ch: 漫长的十纪中，星际和平公司从未放弃将诸界重新连通的愿景。在博识学会的鼎力支持下，我们已初步掌握了绕过星核污染的技术，并在一百一十三个星系进行了实验，取得了可喜的成果。
t_en: Over the past ten long eras, the Interastral Peace Corporation had never given up on our hope of reconnecting the worlds. With the Intelligentsia Guild's ardent support, we have established preliminary technologies to bypass the Stellaron's corrosion, and have obtained positive results after experimenting on <unbreak>113</unbreak> star systems.

t_ch: 漫长的十纪中，星际和平公司从未放弃将诸界重新连通的愿景。
t_en: For the entirety of the past ten Amber Eras, the Interastral Peace Corporation has never given up on our hope of reconnecting the worlds.

t_ch: 在博识学会的鼎力支持下，我们已初步掌握了绕过星核污染的技术，并在一百一十三个星系进行了实验，取得了可喜的成果。
t_en: With the Intelligentsia Guild's ardent support, we have begun developing technologies to bypass Stellaron Corrosion. Experiments conducted across <unbreak>113</unbreak> galaxies have shown promising results.

t_ch: 银河浩瀚无边，而我们并不孤单。已陨的星神，「开拓」阿基维利曾搭乘的星穹列车如今重新起航。
t_en: The galaxy is vast, yet we are not alone. The Astral Express, once piloted by the fallen Aeon Akivili the Trailblaze, has embarked on its journey once again.

t_ch: 这群年轻的无名客自称继承了阿基维利的意志，将重新开辟星与星之间的航线，再现九百九十纪前的「第一次繁荣」。
t_en: These young Nameless claim to have inherited the will of Akivili and will re-establish the access routes between the stars, recreating the First Prosperity from <unbreak>990</unbreak> Amber Eras ago.

t_ch: 在此，我们代表星际和平公司向星穹列车的开拓者们送上最真挚的祝福。
t_en: On behalf of the Interastral Peace Corporation, we wish the best of luck to the Trailblazers of the Astral Express.

t_ch: 在寰宇人民深受星核困扰的同时，一伙新兴起的邪恶组织「星核猎手」却在宇宙中四处作乱。
t_en: While the residents of the galaxy are plagued by the Stellarons, a new evil organization called the Stellaron Hunters has been stirring up trouble.

t_ch: 此前报导过，「星核猎手」入侵了天才俱乐部的螺丝咕姆星球，与星球的主人螺丝咕姆爆发了冲突。根据最新消息，他们上一次出现的地点是仙舟「罗浮」。
t_en: We have previously reported that the Stellaron Hunters invaded Planet Screwllum of the Genius Society and started a conflict with the owner of that planet, Screwllum. According to the latest reports, the Stellaron Hunters were most recently sighted at the Xianzhou Luofu.

t_ch: 公司驻联盟特派员已向罗浮将军景元求证，截至目前尚未得到正式回复。
t_en: The IPC's Special Commissioner to the Alliance had contacted General Jing Yuan of the Luofu to verify this information. We have yet to receive a response.

t_ch: 「星核猎手」曾犯下多起大案，任何一名成员均有独自覆灭一颗星球的能力，其效忠的星神尚不明确，划定为极度危险份子。
t_en: The Stellaron Hunters have committed many significant crimes. Any one of their members has the power to destroy a planet, and it remains uncertain which Aeon the group is loyal to. They are classified as extremely dangerous terrorists.

t_ch: 如遭遇疑似星核猎手的成员，请立刻联系公司，切勿打草惊蛇。提供有效线索者，将获得重金酬赏。
t_en: If you encounter anyone suspected of being a Stellaron Hunter, please contact the IPC immediately and do not act on your own. Anyone who provides useful information will be substantially rewarded.

t_ch: 此前报导过，「星核猎手」入侵了天才俱乐部的螺丝咕姆星球，与星球的主人螺丝咕姆爆发了冲突。
t_en: As we previously discussed on our program, the Stellaron Hunters illegally gained access to Planet Screwllum, which is under the purview of the Genius Society, and clashed with the head of the planet, Screwllum.

t_ch: 根据最新消息，他们上一次出现的地点是仙舟「罗浮」。公司驻联盟特派员已向罗浮将军景元求证，截至目前尚未得到正式回复。
t_en: Our latest reports suggest that the criminal group has recently been spotted on the Xianzhou Luofu. The IPC's Special Commissioner to the Alliance has contacted General Jing Yuan of the Luofu to verify this information. We have yet to receive a response.

t_ch: 已知多个派系收到了盛会之星「匹诺康尼」的邀请函。据悉，这是匹诺康尼的「家族」首次公开向银河各派系发出正式邀约。
t_en: Meanwhile, many factions have received an invitation to Penacony, the Planet of Festivities. This is the first time that The Family in Penacony has openly sent formal invitations to all galactic factions.

t_ch: 星际和平公司也在邀请之列，「战略投资部」部长钻石称将谨慎评估家族此举的意义，并将积极友好作出应对。
t_en: The Interastral Peace Corporation is among the factions invited. The head of the Strategic Investment Department, Diamond, has stated that we will carefully examine the purpose behind this gesture, and respond to it in a positive and friendly manner.

t_ch: 我们期盼银河各方携手并肩，守护美好家园，抵御邪恶势力的侵犯。
t_en: We look forward to having all galactic factions join together to protect our homelands and defend against the invasion of evil forces.

t_ch: 「绝灭大君」焚风现身于提亚奴阿星系。据悲悼伶人的消息，该星系已遭毁灭。
t_en: The Lord Ravager, Zephyro, was spotted at the Tia'nua galaxy. According to the Mourning Actors, that galaxy has been completely destroyed.

t_ch: 反物质军团正在全银河范围内肆虐，引发的灾变与破坏难以数计。公司提请广大群众重视「存护」的意义。
t_en: The Antimatter Legion is ravaging through the galaxy and has caused countless calamities. The IPC would like to remind everyone to remember the significance of the Preservation.

t_ch: 任何接入心灵通感信标的星球，都可以向公司免费索取由筑城者提供的《星际和平指南》。
t_en: Any planet with a telepathy beacon can obtain from the IPC free copies of the Interastral Peace Guide written by the Architects.

t_ch: 在琥珀<unbreak>2158</unbreak>纪的开端，星际和平公司骄傲地宣布：天才俱乐部著名学者黑塔女士已正式承诺与公司达成长期友好合作同盟关系。
t_en: At the beginning of <unbreak>2158</unbreak> AE, the Interastral Peace Corporation would like to proudly announce that the famous scientist, Madam Herta of the Genius Society, has officially committed to a long-term alliance and cooperative relationship with the IPC.

t_ch: 这将是第<unbreak>22</unbreak>号会员利尔他、第<unbreak>56</unbreak>号会员以利亚萨拉斯之后，第三位智识的天才与公司携手，共同存护琥珀王的宇宙。
t_en: Madam Herta is the third genius of the Erudition to partner with the IPC, after Member #22 Aiden and Member #56 Elias Salas. The Corporation stands united with Madam Herta to protect the Amber Lord's universe.

t_ch: 本次播报到此结束，请在指定时间收听下一周期的星际和平播报。再见。
t_en: And this is the end of our broadcast. Please tune in for our next episode. Thank you for listening.

t_ch: 再见。
t_en: Goodbye.

t_ch: 这里是星际和平播报，观众朋友们晚上好。
t_en: Welcome to the Interastral Peace Broadcast. Good evening everyone.

t_ch: 晚上好。
t_en: Good evening.

t_ch: 欢迎收看今天的星际和平播报节目。首先为您介绍今天节目的主要内容。
t_en: Welcome to a new episode of Interastral Peace Broadcast. We are here to bring you the latest news from across the galaxy.

t_ch: 冰封世界雅利洛-Ⅵ重新传来通讯信号，星球原住民或有生还可能。
t_en: Signal transmissions from Jarilo-VI have been detected. This could mean that there are still survivors on the icy planet.

t_ch: 「厄兆先锋」向西格玛叁号星系发出警告，恶性噬硅细菌存在向该地区传播趋势。
t_en: The Omen Vanguards have warned the Sigmar-III galaxy about the potential spread of malignant silicon-eating bacteria.

t_ch: 博识学会武装考古学派在海尔雷星发现一微缩星系，相关工程正在持续进行中。
t_en: The Armed Archaeologists of the Intelligentsia Guild have discovered a miniature galaxy on Hellem. Further investigation is being conducted.

t_ch: 「荷尔斯泰因大静默」被证实是「焚化工」所为，巡海游侠宣布正在追查失窃记忆下落。
t_en: It has been confirmed that The Cremators are responsible for the Holstein Aphasia. Galaxy Rangers have announced that they are working on retrieving stolen memories and that the investigation is ongoing.

t_ch: 以下为您展开详细报道。
t_en: Let's take a closer look at the details.

t_ch: 日前，据星际和平家电雅利洛片区分店某销售员消息称，冰封七百余年的雅利洛-Ⅵ表面再度传来通讯信号。
t_en: A sales rep from the Jarilo branch of Interastral Peace Appliances told us that signal transmissions have been detected from Jarilo-VI, a planet that has been sealed under heavy snow for over <unbreak>700</unbreak> years.

t_ch: 公司对此高度重视，第一时间对该信号进行了深度解析。
t_en: The IPC responded promptly and performed an analysis on the signals.

t_ch: 根据信号内容，雅利洛-Ⅵ原住民在数琥珀纪前的浩劫中幸存至今，并于不久前在一群无名客的帮助下成功结束了大寒潮。
t_en: The message that the signals contain states that the natives of the planet have survived the catastrophe that happened many Amber Eras ago and recently received help from a group known as the Nameless, which allowed them to put an end to the Eternal Freeze.

t_ch: 目前，公司方面已派出相关人员前往调查雅利洛-Ⅵ现状。让我们祝愿幸存者们尽快回归「存护」的命途！
t_en: The IPC has sent out investigators to assess the situation on Jarilo-VI. Let us hope that the survivors can return to the Path of Preservation as soon as possible!

t_ch: 「厄兆先锋」于近日同星际和平公司取得联系，向公司预警了即将来临的灾变。
t_en: The Omen Vanguards recently reached out to the IPC and warned about the spread of a certain strain of bacteria.

t_ch: 该派系成员委托公司向西格玛叁号星系发出警告，在柔贰号星系大规模蔓延的恶性噬硅细菌存在向该星区传播的趋势。
t_en: Members from the Vanguards have asked the IPC to alert the residents that there are signs of an outbreak of a malignant silicon-eating bacteria in Sigmar-III. The bacteria had previously been seen proliferating in Mollis-II.

t_ch: 据博识学会有关专家表示，此种恶性细菌可以通过剧烈的生化反应，将绝大部分硅酸盐及硅氧化合物中的硅原子剥离，并供给其自我复制。
t_en: Experts from the Intelligentsia Guild suggest that this type of bacteria can peel off the silicon atoms stored in the vast majority of silicates and silicone compounds via violent biochemical reactions. It will then use these silicon atoms to duplicate itself.

t_ch: 藉由此种生物过程，该细菌会分泌一种具有强腐蚀性的生物膜，若处理不当，将对人身财产安全造成严重威胁。
t_en: In this process, the bacteria will generate a membrane that is highly corrosive. When not handled properly, this type of bacteria can pose a serious hazard to health and safety.

t_ch: 星际和平公司在此呼吁：该星系的机械生命领导人应尽早尽快制定应对政策，防止人身财产安全蒙受损失，并遏制疾病的进一步蔓延。
t_en: The IPC calls upon the leaders of mechanical life forms in Sigmar-III to take action to contain the bacteria and safeguard public health.

t_ch: 博识学会武装考古学派话事人在近期的新闻发布会上表示，海尔雷星分队在星球南回归线某洞窟中发现了一微缩星系。
t_en: The spokesperson of the Armed Archaeologists under the Intelligentsia Guild stated in a recent press conference that a squad dispatched to Hellem has discovered a miniature galaxy in a cave located near the planet's southern tropical latitudes.

t_ch: 据称，该分队在当地山脉开展爆破工程时，在剖开的山体中意外发现一容器样建筑。调查过后，该分队确信其中存在一虚数亚空间场，并确认了其功能。
t_en: The squad was conducting demolition missions on certain mountain ranges when they discovered a curious facility in the shape of a container. After investigation, the squad was convinced that there was a Sub-space field within the facility and confirmed its function.

t_ch: 海尔雷分队队长向公司介绍，该亚空间场实际上是一微缩星系，且该人造星系中很可能仍存有居民。
t_en: The squad leader told the IPC that the sub-space field they had discovered was in fact a miniature artificially made galaxy and that they were fairly certain that it was still populated.

t_ch: 目前，海尔雷分队正在进一步持续开展相关工程，试图与亚空间场中的居民取得联系。星际和平播报将对此事进行持续报道。
t_en: As of now, the squad has been carrying out further work in an attempt to contact the galaxy's residents. We will bring you more updates on this developing story as they become available.

t_ch: 某不愿透露姓名的巡海游侠声称，琥珀<unbreak>2157</unbreak>纪初期的「荷尔斯泰因大静默」实由「焚化工」所为。
t_en: A member of the Galaxy Rangers who wishes to remain anonymous claims that The Cremators are behind the Holstein Aphasia that occurred in early <unbreak>2157</unbreak> AE.

t_ch: 据可靠消息，小股不法分子通过某种特殊手段，将荷尔斯泰因星系全部居民有关「语言」的记忆全部窃走。
t_en: Research from reliable sources suggest that certain criminal groups snatched all the memories relating to "language" from the residents of Holstein via unconventional means.

t_ch: 因此，失去了「语言」记忆的荷尔斯泰因居民忘记了如何说话，导致了该星系全域静默至今。
t_en: The residents of Holstein have since lost the ability to produce speech. To this day, the Holstein galaxy remains silent.

t_ch: 在星际和平公司的帮助下，该星系已可通过书面通用语进行简单沟通。
t_en: There is some good news, though — with the help of the IPC, the residents of Holstein have learned to communicate through written language.

t_ch: 本次播报到此结束，请在指定时间收听下一周期的星际和平播报。再见。
t_en: And this is the end of our broadcast. Please tune in for our next episode. Thank you for listening.

t_ch: 再见。
t_en: Goodbye.

t_ch: 这里是星际和平播报，观众朋友们晚上好。
t_en: Welcome to the Interastral Peace Broadcast. Good evening everyone.

t_ch: 晚上好。
t_en: Good evening.

t_ch: 欢迎收听今天的星际和平播报节目。首先为您介绍今天节目的主要内容。
t_en: Welcome to a new episode of Interastral Peace Broadcast. We are here to bring you the latest news from across the galaxy.

t_ch: 星际和平公司与仙舟联盟再次重新签署互惠贸易协定，利好双边经济。
t_en: The IPC and the Xianzhou Alliance have renewed their trade agreement, bringing great economic benefits to both parties.

t_ch: 博识学会武装考古学派首席学士艾伦•琼斯主持发掘潜在灾害评级为Ω的古代遗迹「械皇遗冢」。
t_en: The head of the Armed Archaeologists of the Intelligentsia Guild, Allen Jones, personally oversaw the excavation of the ancient tomb of Emperor Rubert I. The ruins rank as a Category Omega site on the Potential Disaster Index.

t_ch: 著名歌者知更鸟受邀莅临匹诺康尼谐乐大典献唱颂歌。
t_en: Renowned songstress, Robin, has received an invitation to perform at Penacony's Charmony Festival.

t_ch: 流光忆庭完成对已逝世界「月卫之盾」的忆质碎片回收工作，世界回忆有望重现。
t_en: The Garden of Recollection has gathered memoria fragments from the lost world of Moonshield — the precious memories of this world will not be forgotten.

t_ch: 以下为您展开详细报道。
t_en: Let's take a closer look at the details.

t_ch: 星际和平公司与仙舟联盟：罗浮再度签署全新的互惠贸易协定。
t_en: Regarding the IPC and the Xianzhou Alliance: The Xianzhou Luofu has opted to renew the trade agreement.

t_ch: 该协定将进一步推动开放双方各自市场，在农业、工业、医药、文化等多个领域深入合作，为缔造自由、开放、繁荣和共赢的商业市场奠定坚实基础。
t_en: The agreement will help to open up markets and promote cooperation between the two sides in agriculture, industry, medicine, and culture, laying a solid foundation for a free, open, and prosperous business environment.

t_ch: 协议签订现场，星际和平公司市场开拓部发言人与罗浮天舶司司舵驭空小姐友好交换了彼此的意见，并在星际安全形势对自由市场的影响等问题上达成了共识。
t_en: At the signing of the agreement, friendly talks were held between Madam Yukong, Sky-Faring Helm Master of the Luofu, and a representative of the IPC's Marketing Development Department. The two sides reached a consensus on various issues, including the impact of interstellar security on the free market.

t_ch: 同时，公司发言人就近日反物质军团入侵仙舟一事向「罗浮」表达关切，并向死难者家属致以慰问。
t_en: The IPC also expressed their heartfelt concern for the Luofu regarding the recent invasion by the Antimatter Legion and sent their condolences to the victims.

t_ch: 星际和平公司强烈谴责反物质军团的野蛮暴行，并愿为一切受军团摧残的世界送上琥珀王的「存护」。
t_en: The IPC strongly condemns the barbaric atrocities committed by the Antimatter Legion and conveys the Amber Lord's wish for Preservation to all worlds ravaged by that wretched force.

t_ch: 一直以来，帝皇鲁珀特一世为宇宙留下了诸多恐怖遗迹，其中「械皇遗冢」自被发现起就备受各方关注。
t_en: Emperor Rubert I left many horrific relics across the universe, and one of them, the Mechanical Emperor Tomb, has captivated the interests of countless people since its discovery.

t_ch: 如今，由博识学会武装考古学派首席学士艾伦•德雷克•独臂•琼斯发起，天才俱乐部成员螺丝咕姆参与合作，正式挖掘这座潜在灾害评级为Ω的钢铁遗迹，揭开它的神秘面纱。
t_en: The excavation of the tomb is headed by the head of the Armed Archaeologists of the Intelligentsia Guild, Allen Drake One-Armed Jones, with assistance from Genius Society member, Screwllum. It is hoped that the excavation of this metallic relic, which holds a Category Omega ranking on the Potential Disaster Index, will finally shed a light on its mysterious nature.

t_ch: 按照无机军团留下的帝皇行止记录显示，兴建该遗迹最初的目的是「存放鲁珀特一世在玄想模式下产生的发明灵感」。
t_en: According to records of the Emperor's deeds left behind by the Inorganic Legion, the original purpose of the site was to "house the inventions inspired by the imagination of Rubert I."

t_ch: 博识学会发言人表示：「我们无从得知琼斯学士会有怎样惊人的发现，但我们希望，他的发现将会让我们更进一步了解帝皇，并使宇宙免于再一次承受他降临时带来的恐怖。」
t_en: A spokesperson for the Intelligentsia Guild said, "We have no way of knowing what amazing discoveries Jones will uncover, but we are hopeful that his findings will further our understanding of the Emperor and help save the universe from the horrors that he will bring with him when he returns."

t_ch: 星际和平播报将对该考古项目持续进一步跟踪报道。
t_en: The Interastral Peace Broadcast will be covering this story throughout the excavation.

t_ch: 盛会之星「匹诺康尼」宣布将邀请知名歌者知更鸟小姐为「谐乐大典」献声演唱。
t_en: Penacony, the Planet of Festivities, announced that it will invite renowned singer, Robin, to perform at the Charmony Festival.

t_ch: 作为盛会之星的悠久传统，每个琥珀纪仅举办一次的盛典，谐乐大典云集无数同谐信众，为宇宙美好的未来而祈愿。
t_en: Once every Amber-Era, countless followers of the Harmony will attend this long-held tradition of the Planet of Festivities, and together pray for a brighter and better future for the universe.

t_ch: 知更鸟小姐身为备受银河瞩目的巨星，曾斩获多项顶级殊荣，其天籁歌喉传扬诸界。
t_en: Robin is a superstar whose voice is known throughout the cosmos. She has been the recipient of many top awards.

t_ch: 据信，此次庆典中，知更鸟将以「家族」名义为「同谐」星神唱响颂歌，揭开大典的序幕。
t_en: It is believed that during the celebrations, Robin will sing a hymn for the Aeon of the Harmony in the name of The Family.

t_ch: 星际和平公司将全程转播本次庆典的盛况，将乐声和美好祝福共同送向寰宇千星。
t_en: The IPC will broadcast the entire event, sending the sounds of music and good wishes to worlds far and wide.

t_ch: 众所周知，流光忆庭始终致力于复现众多陨落的文明，为银河留下复苏的火种。
t_en: As we all know, the Garden of Recollection has always been committed to the restoration of lost civilizations, igniting the spark of revival across the cosmos.

t_ch: 根据可靠消息，在忆者的努力下，死灭世界「月卫之盾」的忆质碎片已全部打捞完毕。
t_en: According to reliable sources, thanks to the efforts of the Memokeepers, all memoria fragments of the deadworld of Moonshield have been salvaged.

t_ch: 该世界毁于反物质军团的入侵，但在公司与忆庭的通力合作下，对该世界的信息提取工作于近日宣告完成。按照忆者们的规划，它将在「记忆」的净土中得到重生。
t_en: Moonshield was destroyed during an invasion by the Antimatter Legion, but with the combined efforts of the IPC and the Garden of Remembrance, the collection of information about the fallen world was recently declared a success. The Memokeepers plan for it to be reborn in the pristine land of the Remembrance.

t_ch: 「毁灭」能带走一切，但永远无法夺走希望。星际和平公司将为银河中一切文明的长远发展提供力所能及的支持与存护——也包括那些消亡的世界。
t_en: The Destruction can destroy any material thing, but it can never take away our hope. The IPC will provide whatever support and protection within its means for the long-term development of all civilizations across the universe — including those that have perished.

t_ch: 本次播报到此结束，请在指定时间收听下一周期的星际和平播报。再见。
t_en: And this is the end of our broadcast. Please tune in for our next episode. Thank you for listening.

t_ch: 再见。
t_en: Thank you.

t_ch: 这里是星际和平播报，观众朋友们晚上好。
t_en: Welcome to the Interastral Peace Broadcast. Good evening everyone.

t_ch: 晚上好。
t_en: Good evening.

t_ch: 欢迎收听今天的星际和平播报节目。首先为您介绍今天节目的主要内容。
t_en: Welcome to a new episode of the Interastral Peace Broadcast. We are here to bring you the latest news from across the cosmos.

t_ch: 备受瞩目的「谐乐大典」遭遇星核袭击，星际和平公司已联合多方势力展开救援。
t_en: The highly anticipated Charmony Festival has fallen victim to a Stellaron attack. The Interastral Peace Corporation, along with allied forces, has commenced a relief effort.

t_ch: 沉寂已久的巡海游侠再度现身，原因或与一位「虚无」的自灭者相关。
t_en: In a surprising turn of events, the once-quiet Galaxy Rangers have made a notable reappearance, a move that is thought to be linked to the Nihility's Self-Annihilator.

t_ch: 星际和平公司将与混沌医师开展合作，为陷入精神危机中的世界提供医疗救助。
t_en: To address the mental health emergencies plaguing various worlds, the IPC has announced a partnership with the Doctors of Chaos to provide medical assistance.

t_ch: 「仙舟联盟」将举行演武仪典， 邀请各友好世界前来观礼。
t_en: The Xianzhou Alliance is set to hold a Wardance ceremony, welcoming attendees from friendly worlds to witness the occasion.

t_ch: 工业行星巴兰扎熔炉在绝灭大君「铁墓」的袭击下瘫痪，联觉信标生产受到影响。
t_en: The industrial planet Baranza Forge has been crippled by an attack from the Lord Ravager "Irontomb," impacting the production of Synesthesia Beacons.

t_ch: 以下为您展开详细报道。
t_en: Let's take a closer look at the details.

t_ch: 盛会之星「匹诺康尼」遭遇一场突如其来的星核袭击，致使谐乐大典意外中断。
t_en: The Planet of Festivities "Penacony" has been hit by an abrupt Stellaron incursion, leading to the unforeseen interruption of the Charmony Festival.

t_ch: 这一事件引发了各世界的广泛关注。日前，在家族、星际和平公司和无名客的共同努力下，星核隐患已得到妥善处理。
t_en: The incident has garnered widespread attention across various worlds. But thanks to the collaborative efforts of The Family, the IPC, and the Nameless, the Stellaron threat has been successfully handled.

t_ch: 期间，公司「战略投资部」与家族代表进行了富有成效的磋商，双方将重启双边贸易，共同应对银河邪恶势力的威胁。
t_en: During this period, the Strategic Investment Department of the IPC held fruitful discussions with Family representatives. Both parties agreed to resume bilateral trade in order to collectively address the challenge posed by nefarious powers throughout the cosmos.

t_ch: 在未来的日子里，公司将与匹诺康尼开展旅游业、制造业、文化艺术等多个领域的深度合作，携手缔造更为璀璨耀眼的盛会之星。
t_en: Moving forward, the IPC plans to partner closely with Penacony in areas such as tourism, manufacturing, and cultural arts, with the aim of enhancing the luster of this celebrated Planet of Festivities.

t_ch: 沉寂已久的巡海游侠现身阿斯德纳星系，这是继琥珀<unbreak>2155</unbreak>纪「血色翁瓦克」以来，该派系首次出现大规模的集结行动。
t_en: The once-quiet Galaxy Rangers have made a notable reappearance in the Asdana system, marking the first significant mobilization of the group since the Crimson Vonwacq event of <unbreak>2155</unbreak> AE, indicating a momentous resurgence.

t_ch: 巡海游侠并未在阿斯德纳停留过久，亦没有引发任何冲突。据悉，此次事件或与「虚无」的自灭者有关。
t_en: The Galaxy Rangers' stay in Asdana was brief and conflict-free. Sources suggest that this activity might be connected to the Nihility's Self-Annihilator.

t_ch: 当地目击者称，他们在巡海游侠到来前普遍产生了难以抑制的负面情绪，或看见离奇的黑洞、裂痕现象。
t_en: Local witnesses reported experiencing inexplicable dark emotions and seeing strange occurrences like black holes and fissures shortly before the Galaxy Rangers made their appearance.

t_ch: 星际和平公司在此呼吁：银河各方势力须保持冷静克制，切勿因一己私仇伤及无辜民众。
t_en: The Interastral Peace Corporation calls for prudence: Entities throughout the cosmos should exercise caution and self-control, ensuring personal grievances do not result in the harm of innocent civilians.

t_ch: 据悉，近三个琥珀纪以来，精神疾病已成为许多世界首要关心的问题。
t_en: Reports indicate that in the last three Amber Eras, mental illnesses have emerged as a top concern across numerous planets.

t_ch: 星际和平公司骄傲地宣布：公司技术研发部已与混沌医师「慕榕」建立长期友好合作关系，将为陷入精神疾病危机的世界提供医疗救助。
t_en: The Interastral Peace Corporation is delighted to announce our Technology Department has established a long-term partnership with Murong from the Doctors of Chaos, aimed at providing medical assistance to worlds engulfed in mental health crises.

t_ch: 星际和平公司坚信，「虚无」绝非不可对抗的敌人。
t_en: The Interastral Peace Corporation holds the conviction that the Nihility is not an insurmountable adversary.

t_ch: 公司将在未来的日子里，投入更多资源聚焦精神疾病问题，愿每个人、每个世界都能以积极健康的心态面对每一天。
t_en: In the days ahead, the IPC will allocate more resources towards addressing mental health issues, with the hope that every individual and every world can face each day with a positive and healthy mindset.

t_ch: 仙舟联盟：罗浮将举行演武仪典，邀请众多友好世界的宾客前往观礼。
t_en: The Xianzhou Luofu is set to conduct a Wardance ceremony, welcoming attendees from numerous allied worlds to observe.

t_ch: 演武仪典是仙舟联盟的节庆仪式。在举办这一庆典期间，一座仙舟将以比武、竞技等方式纪念云骑军在「巡猎」星神的庇佑下赢得胜利。
t_en: The Wardance is a celebratory tradition within the Xianzhou Alliance. Throughout this celebration, a Xianzhou vessel pays tribute to the Cloud Knight victories achieved under the Aeon, The Hunt, through displays of combat and competitive events.

t_ch: 据悉，自反物质军团入侵事件之后，这是仙舟联盟首次向银河各界发出访问邀请。其重建情况如何，让我们拭目以待。
t_en: According to reports, this is the Xianzhou Alliance's first outreach to the cosmic populace since the Antimatter Legion's attack. The progress of their recovery is something we'll watch with interest.

t_ch: 星际和平播报将全程转播演武仪典的精彩赛事，欢迎各位观众届时收看。
t_en: Stay with Interastral Peace Broadcast for full live coverage of the Wardance's thrilling competitions. We encourage viewers to tune in and enjoy the action.

t_ch: 断联已久的工业行星巴兰扎熔炉确认遭到绝灭大君「铁墓」入侵，陷入全面瘫痪状态。
t_en: After a prolonged silence, it has been verified that the industrial world Baranza Forge has been invaded by the Lord Ravager Irontomb, plunging it into a state of complete paralysis.

t_ch: 据悉，绝灭大君「铁墓」常出现于科技发达的世界，以残酷无情的手段摧毁高度发展的文明。
t_en: Sources indicate that the Lord Ravager Irontomb frequently targets technologically advanced worlds, employing ruthless methods to obliterate highly developed civilizations.

t_ch: 巴兰扎熔炉是联觉信标的重要加工基地。此次袭击将对公司的边境拓荒事业造成不可忽视的影响。
t_en: Baranza Forge plays a vital role in the manufacturing of Synesthesia Beacons. The implications of this assault will undoubtedly influence the IPC's frontier pioneering efforts.

t_ch: 星际和平公司强烈谴责「反物质军团」的暴行，并呼吁宇宙间的文明联合起来，共同抵御「毁灭」的入侵。
t_en: The IPC strongly condemns the barbaric atrocities committed by the Antimatter Legion, and calls upon civilizations across the universe to unite and resist the invasion of the Destruction.

t_ch: 日前，第一支救援队已抵达巴兰扎熔炉，将与流光忆庭展开合作，抢救珍贵的技术成果，并帮助幸存者恢复正常的生活。
t_en: Just days ago, the first rescue team arrived on Baranza Forge, and will work alongside the Garden of Recollection to salvage valuable technology achievements, and assist survivors in rebuilding their lives.

t_ch: 星际和平播报将持续追踪报道巴兰扎事件，让我们为遇难者哀悼，祈愿和平的降临。
t_en: The Interastral Peace Broadcast remains committed to following the Baranza event closely. We'd like to extend our condolences to the victims and hope that peace will prevail.

t_ch: 本次播报到此结束，请在指定时间收听下一周期的星际和平播报。再见。
t_en: And this is the end of our broadcast. Please tune in for our next episode. Thank you for listening.

t_ch: 再见。
t_en: Goodbye.

t_ch: 那么，请允许小女子代表天舶司，欢迎各位恩公光临「星槎海」。
t_en: On behalf of the Sky-Faring Commission, allow me to welcome you to Starskiff Haven.

t_ch: 「罗浮」仙舟上，举凡空域、航行和贸易事务，一应由位列六司的「天舶司」主掌。作为最大的港口，星槎海也在我们治下。
t_en: On the Xianzhou Luofu, anything relating to aviation, navigation, and trade falls within the scope of the Sky-Faring Commission, which is one of the six commissions of the Luofu. As the biggest port on the ship, Starskiff Haven is governed by the Sky-Faring Commission, too.

t_ch: 不愧是…呃，什么渡使，说起话来好有气场。
t_en: You definitely sound like a... what was it again...? Oh, Amicassador! By which I mean — nice speech.

t_ch: 见笑了。我负责接渡来往的商客。这些文绉绉的场面话，我隔三差五要说一通的。
t_en: That's too kind of you. My job involves ferrying business delegates to and from Starskiff Haven, so I do this kind of introduction all the time.

t_ch: 总之，到这儿就安全了。本该带大家游览一番，让小女子尽尽地主之谊。但眼下非常时期，我们先走一趟司辰宫，向驭空大人禀报各位的来意。
t_en: Anyway, we're safe now. Normally I'd be a good host and take you around. But these are difficult times. Let's head to the Palace of Astrum first and report your arrival to Madam Yukong.

t_ch: 司辰宫？
t_en: Palace of Astrum?

t_ch: 瞧见了没，城里最高的建筑。那儿就是天舶司的总部。事不宜迟，咱们快些去吧。
t_en: Right there, the tallest building in the city. It's also the headquarters of the Sky-Faring Commission. Let's hurry. We haven't got much time.

t_ch: 你为啥这么着急？
t_en: What's the hurry?

t_ch: 我们歇一会再去。
t_en: We need to take a breather.

t_ch: 让我们讨论一下。
t_en: Can we talk about it first?

t_ch: 哎呀，不是我着急，是怕驭空大人怪罪下来，小女子担不起这个责任……
t_en: *sigh* I don't mean to rush you, but if Madam Yukong holds me accountable for not getting you over soon enough, I wouldn't want to be around for the consequences...

t_ch: 这么可怕？你不是说她为人很和善嘛？
t_en: Sounds scary. I thought you said she was kind-hearted?

t_ch: 觐见六司，总得有些准备。停云小姐放心，我们不去他处。劳烦你先通报一声，我们稍后在司辰宫门口等候。
t_en: We need to make a few preparations before paying a visit to any of the six commissions. Rest assured, Miss Tingyun, we won't go anywhere. If you could inform Madam Yukong of our arrival first, we'll meet you at the palace entrance later.

t_ch: …好吧。
t_en: ...Very well.

t_ch: 那位狐狸姑娘做事节奏太快，我都难以适应，也许是闲得太久了…抓住这点时间好好喘口气吧，这会是我们唯一空闲的时光了。
t_en: Little miss fox moves at quite the pace — I can't keep up with her. *sigh* I've spent too long on the bench... Let's catch our breath for a while — we can expect a packed schedule ahead.

t_ch: 那个停云好像非常狡猾…
t_en: That Tingyun is a sly one...

t_ch: 谈不上狡猾吧，她的考虑都以利己为第一出发点。
t_en: That might be a little harsh, but she does put her own interests first.

t_ch: 遇到身份不明的可疑人士，做好防范是明智之举；随后的赶路，只能说她畏惧担责，想尽快把我们这个麻烦丢到上级头上去吧。
t_en: She did the right thing by not trusting us initially — we were an unknown quantity to her. As for the rush... my guess is she's just eager to get us out of her hair and further up the chain.

t_ch: 那个驭空似乎不好对付…
t_en: That Yukong sounds like a tough lady...

t_ch: 又不是去对付她，放心。我们行事光明磊落，没有什么可怕的。
t_en: It'll be alright, we're not trying to stand in her way. We have nothing to hide from her.

t_ch: 在贝洛伯格我们也挺光明磊落的……
t_en: We didn't have anything to hide in Belobog, either...

t_ch: 好耶，逛街咯！
t_en: Nice! Let's have a look around the city.

t_ch: 别急……
t_en: Not so fast...

t_ch: 先给两位打个预防针。接下来的谒见环节，务必打起精神，认真应对。
t_en: I need to give you two a heads up first. Our meeting with Madam Yukong won't be without risk. We need to be prepared and take it seriously.

t_ch: 杨叔是担心这次面见仙舟的长官，我们会重蹈贝洛伯格的覆辙嘛…？
t_en: She is a top Xianzhou leader... Mr. Yang, do you think this could be Belobog all over again...?

t_ch: 你是说，驭空就是幕后黑手！？
t_en: Are you saying that... Madam Yukong is the new Madam Cocolia!?

t_ch: 难不成仙舟也要在旅馆下手…
t_en: Let me guess, they're gonna put us up in a hotel first...

t_ch: 不会，仙舟联盟不至于如此失礼。但这位驭空接见我们时，一定会问出一连串问题——
t_en: No, the Xianzhou Alliance is better than that. But Madam Yukong will definitely have a string of difficult questions for us...

t_ch: 为什么我们选择这个时机来到仙舟？我们如何得知这场灾变与星核有关？什么人向我们透露仙舟的消息？……
t_en: Why did we choose to come to the Xianzhou now? How did we know that the incident is related to a Stellaron? Who leaked their information to us...?

t_ch: 回答若有不慎，很可能换来戒备与敌意，行事也会倍加困难。
t_en: Careless answers mean distrust and potential hostility, which would make things much harder for us.

t_ch: 这可糟了，我和{NICKNAME}都是笨嘴笨舌，一不小心就说错话的类型……
t_en: Aw, crud. One of us is gonna blurt something out or get something wrong, I just know it...

t_ch: 你对我的误会可大了。
t_en: I feel offended.

t_ch: 你瞧，我又说错话了吧。
t_en: *sigh* See?

t_ch: 话都让杨叔说。
t_en: Mr. Yang should do the talking.

t_ch: 好主意，咱们两个在旁边扮演氛围组，给杨叔加油助威。
t_en: Good idea! We can be his cheerleaders in the background.

t_ch: …不，还是要严肃点。
t_en: ...Let's not do that.

t_ch: 那要不咱们先对个供词？
t_en: Shouldn't we plan out what we want to say?

t_ch: 咱们又没做亏心事，对什么供词呀！
t_en: Ugh... But we haven't done anything wrong!

t_ch: 小三月说的不错。试图遮遮掩掩，只会让我们显得别有用心。
t_en: March is right. If we're too scripted, it'll sound like we're hiding something.

t_ch: 坦诚回答，如实相告。
t_en: Let's just be honest with her.

t_ch: 那万一他们以为我们和星核猎手是一伙的怎么办？别说联盟了，我都不相信星核猎手……
t_en: What if she thinks we're with the Stellaron Hunters? Never mind the Alliance, even I don't trust them...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}说的不错。试图遮遮掩掩，只会让我们显得别有用心。
t_en: {NICKNAME} is right. If we're too scripted, it'll sound like we're hiding something.

t_ch: 车到山前必有路。你们不必为难，到时候由我来应答就行。
t_en: Don't worry. We'll find a way through. Let me do the talking.

t_ch: 咦？恩公们到得挺早啊。久等啦，驭空大人在司辰宫内恭候各位。
t_en: Oh, you're here already? Sorry to keep you waiting. Madam Yukong is expecting you.

t_ch: 你不来吗？
t_en: Are you not coming?

t_ch: 小女子已经将各位的情况呈报了司舵大人，我就不进去啦～
t_en: I've brought Madam Helm Master up to speed. It's over to you now~

t_ch: ——是，大人。
t_en: Yes, Madam.

t_ch: 将损失数据呈报给景元将军，再把太卜司的人找来。这么大的乱子，他们岂能置身事外……
t_en: Report the losses to General Jing Yuan and find someone from the Divination Commission. They can't just stand there watching while we deal with this mess...

t_ch: 「星穹列车」的客人，你们好。
t_en: Greetings, guests from the Astral Express.

t_ch: 你们的来意，停云已经悉数向我禀报过了。本来我的职责并不包括接见旅客。
t_en: Tingyun has informed me of the purpose of your visit. Receiving guests isn't normally one of my responsibilities...

t_ch: 但既然你们知道星核，又言明要帮助「罗浮」。那么于情于理，我都要给各位一个面对面的机会……
t_en: ...but since you know about the Stellaron and have stated that you want to help the Luofu, I thought I should at least meet you in person...

t_ch: 亲口谢绝各位。
t_en: ...and politely decline your proposal.

t_ch: 拒绝！？
t_en: Decline!?

t_ch: 为什么！
t_en: Why!?

t_ch: 区区星核而已，联盟早已知悉此物，自有办法应对。仙舟翾翔八千载，见惯了危急存亡。眼下的灾难虽来势汹汹，仙舟亦有余力自处，不需假借外人之力来平息祸端。
t_en: The Xianzhou Alliance knows what a Stellaron is and is more than capable of handling it ourselves. We have been around for over <unbreak>8000</unbreak> years and weathered countless dangers and crises. While the situation is serious, we have more than enough resources to spare. Outsider help is not needed on this occasion.

t_ch: 各位远到是客，断无理由卷入此事——我这么说，你们可明白？
t_en: You are guests from afar — there is no reason for this matter to concern you... Am I making myself clear?

t_ch: 从目前的状况来看，星核的影响尚未完全深入。
t_en: From what we've gathered, the influence of the Stellaron can still be contained.

t_ch: 如果能及时找到位置，对其进行遏制，无论是被侵蚀的空间，还是遭受侵染的人，都有复原的可能。
t_en: If we can locate it in time and contain it, it's possible that we can restore any space — and any individuals — affected by the corrosion.

t_ch: 我们曾经阻止过星核的灾难，这一次前来，也只是为了助各位一臂之力。
t_en: We have experience in preventing Stellaron disasters, and we've only come here to lend you that experience.

t_ch: 我已说得很清楚：这是仙舟联盟的内部事务，不劳星穹列车插手。为示尊重，我特意接见各位，传达最终的决定，不容更改。
t_en: I've said this and I'll say it again: This is an internal affair of the Xianzhou Alliance and there is no need for the Astral Express to get involved. I decided to arrange a meeting with you as a gesture of respect, but my decision is final.

t_ch: 可是——
t_en: ...But—

t_ch: 算啦杨叔，联盟自己能搞定，咱们还费那个心干嘛。我们走就是了。
t_en: Never mind, Mr. Yang. If the Xianzhou Alliance say they can handle it, then we're wasting our breath. Let's go.

t_ch: 不，你们走不得。
t_en: I'm afraid that's impossible.

t_ch: …喂，这就有点过分了啊。
t_en: ...Huh? And what's that supposed to mean?

t_ch: 「罗浮」上发现星核不过数日，星槎海全面封闭，无人离开——各位如何未卜先知，又怎么认定这一切与星核有关？
t_en: It's only been a few days since the presence of a Stellaron was detected on the Luofu. Starskiff Haven has been under full lockdown — no one has been permitted to leave. How did you come to know of the incident, and what led you to conclude that it was linked to a Stellaron?

t_ch: 我调取了星槎海的出入记录，在不久前，有人骇入系统，打开玉界门，指引一艘舰船入港，那就是你们：星穹列车……
t_en: I acquired the access history of Starskiff Haven. Not long ago, someone hacked into the system and opened the Jade Gate, before guiding you, the Astral Express, into our territory.

t_ch: 而骇入系统的人手段高明，甚至故意留下了一道印戳，仿佛挑衅——「银狼」，星核猎手的一员。
t_en: The hacker was skillful and even taunted us with her seal. Her name is Silver Wolf, a member of the Stellaron Hunters...

t_ch: 对此，你们又作何解释？
t_en: What say you in your defense?

t_ch: 是星核猎手委托我们来的！
t_en: The Stellaron Hunters told us to come here!

t_ch: 此乃驱虎吞狼之计也！
t_en: The Stellaron Hunters want to use you to take us out!

t_ch: 在上述疑团查清前，你们不得离开天舶司。
t_en: You are forbidden from leaving the Sky-Faring Commission until the aforementioned questions have been investigated.

t_ch: 驭空，别这么凶嘛，要是传出去，岂不让银河耻笑仙舟联盟不得待客之道？
t_en: Don't be too harsh, Yukong. If this gets out, the whole galaxy will think the Alliance has forgotten how to treat our guests.

t_ch: 景元将军——
t_en: General Jing Yuan—

t_ch: 星穹列车怎么可能和星核猎手同盟呢，他们可是死对头呀。
t_en: It's very unlikely that the Express has joined forces with the Stellaron Hunters. They are mortal enemies, after all.

t_ch: 打扰各位的会面，我是「罗浮」云骑将军：景元。
t_en: Apologies for interrupting your meeting. My name is Jing Yuan — I'm the general of the Cloud Knights here on the Luofu.

t_ch: 将军，这是罗浮的内部事务……
t_en: General, this is an internal affair for the Luofu...

t_ch: 对，对，内部事务——我完全赞同驭空司舵的意见。
t_en: I fully agree with you, Helm Master Yukong, this is indeed an internal affair.

t_ch: 很抱歉，列车团的各位。「罗浮」上确实有一颗星核，但我必须拒绝你们的好意：这是仙舟的问题，只能由我们自己解决。
t_en: I am sorry, guests of the Astral Express. It is true that there is a Stellaron on the Luofu, but I'm afraid I cannot accept your kind offer to help resolve the issue. This is a Xianzhou matter, and it is our responsibility to handle it.

t_ch: ——但是来都来了，怎能让各位无功而返！虽然「星核」一事不能接受列车团的帮助，但我确实另有一事，非得拜托各位不可！请！
t_en: ...Of course, it would be inappropriate of me to let you return without something to show for it. While I cannot accept your help with regard to the Stellaron, I do have a favor to ask. Please, after you.

t_ch: 星穹列车——在下闻名已久，心驰神往，今日得见，幸甚至哉！
t_en: The Astral Express! I must confess that the train's reputation precedes it, such that it is often close to my thoughts. How delightful to come face to face with its passengers!

t_ch: 幸甚至哉！
t_en: Frightfully delightful!

t_ch: 歌以咏志！
t_en: Would that this occasion had come sooner!

t_ch: …你真的是将军吗？
t_en: ...Are you really a general?

t_ch: 久仰将军大名，您有什么事要拜托我们？
t_en: It's an honor to meet you, general. May I ask what the favor you spoke of is?

t_ch: 噢，那可是非各位莫属。数日前，我们抓住了一位擅闯仙舟重地的星核猎手，叫做「刃」。
t_en: Ah, a matter that requires capable people such as yourselves. We captured a member of the Stellaron Hunters a few days ago, who goes by the name of "Blade."

t_ch: 审讯刃的期间，太卜司——仙舟负责情报与信息推演的部门——截获了他潜藏在仙舟上的同党「卡芙卡」发出的通信。至于通讯对象嘛……
t_en: During our investigation, the Divination Commission — the department in charge of intelligence processing — intercepted a transmission sent out by his accomplice, Kafka, who has managed to hide aboard the ship. As for where that transmission was destined...

t_ch: 是列车。
t_en: The Express.

t_ch: 是谁？！
t_en: Go on! Where!?

t_ch: 各位与星核猎手之间的关系，我也略知一二。太卜司认为你们必是同党！我说不可能。星穹列车行事正派，见义勇为的美名诸界传扬，岂能与宵小之辈同流合污？
t_en: I have some knowledge of your relationship with the Stellaron Hunters. The Divination Commission is convinced that you made an alliance with them... I say that's impossible. The crew of the Astral Express are honorable people whose valiant deeds are lauded across the universe. There must have been a misunderstanding.

t_ch: 因此这则通信，必是星核猎手祸水东引的毒计。
t_en: As such, I came to the conclusion that the communication must have been an attempt by the Stellaron Hunters to sow dissent between us.

t_ch: 没错，我们是被陷害的！
t_en: That's right! We've been framed!

t_ch: 星核猎手也许更有深意…
t_en: Maybe the Stellaron Hunters have other motives...

t_ch: 「星核」之灾，仙舟确有解决法子。但平定灾患需要时间，需得投入云骑军主力方能成事。但这卡芙卡潜藏在仙舟上，终究是个祸患，不得不防。
t_en: We can handle the Stellaron, but it will take time and will require the bulk of the Cloud Knights on the ship. It is this Kafka that concerns me. The longer she stays on the ship, the bigger the threat she will pose.

t_ch: 既然星核猎手故意将各位引来罗浮，你我正好顺水推舟。我以将军身份给予诸位在仙舟便宜行事的权限，将下落不明的卡芙卡引出，一举捉拿。
t_en: Since the Stellaron Hunters lured you to our ship, we shall move with the current. You are hereby authorized to do as you deem fit on the Luofu, with the goal of bringing Kafka out of the shadows and under our control.

t_ch: 如此，一来洗清各位被星核猎手泼上的污水，二来也好得知这猎手潜入仙舟的目的，又与爆发的星核有何关联。列车团的诸位，意下如何？
t_en: Doing so would clear the misunderstanding between us, reveal the true intentions of the Stellaron Hunters, and help us understand their connection to the Stellaron burst. What say you, my Astral guests?

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}，你认为呢？
t_en: ...{NICKNAME}, what do you think?

t_ch: 不妨顺水推舟，也帮点忙。
t_en: Let's move with the current and help out.

t_ch: 各位若能帮我捉住星核猎手，便是帮了仙舟一个大忙。
t_en: If you are able to capture this Stellaron Hunter, the Xianzhou will be indebted to you.

t_ch: 但此行本意是「星核」。
t_en: Our expedition was focused on the Stellaron...

t_ch: 很遗憾，事关外交，我必得公事公办。但若能捉拿猎手，得知其投放星核的目的，亦是在「星核」一事上帮了大忙。
t_en: I'm afraid my hands are tied on the matter — this is a diplomatic affair and I have rules to follow. But if you can bring me the Stellaron Hunter and discover her motive for placing a Stellaron on the ship, it would be of great help in resolving the incident.

t_ch: 我们也没得选。
t_en: We don't really have a choice.

t_ch: 各位当然有的选。无情人遭拒，抽身离去便是。但你们依然心念帮助仙舟。
t_en: Of course you do. You can be strangers and simply walk away. But I feel you wish to help the Xianzhou.

t_ch: 君如以赤诚待我，「罗浮」理当报以赤诚。
t_en: The Luofu never fails to reward that which is given.

t_ch: …好吧。
t_en: ...Okay.

t_ch: 妙极，一言为定。我这便下令，着驭空分享一切情报，拨出精锐人手，助各位展开搜捕。
t_en: Wonderful, it's a deal then. I shall notify Yukong that all intel is to be shared with you, and that our best personnel are to aid you in your search.

t_ch: 滞留仙舟期间，如有用得上天舶司和云骑军的地方，不用客气。
t_en: If there's anything the Sky-Faring Commission or the Cloud Knights can do for you during your stay, don't hesitate to make it known.

t_ch: 我知道你，{NICKNAME}对吧？…联盟对星穹列车也很关注呢。
t_en: I have heard of you, {NICKNAME}... The Alliance is very interested in the Astral Express.

t_ch: 关于刃…
t_en: About Blade...

t_ch: 「刃」不仅被公司通缉，也是联盟在案的重犯。关于他的情报，恕我无法透露。
t_en: Blade is wanted by both the IPC and the Alliance. I'm afraid I cannot comment on his file.

t_ch: 关于卡芙卡…
t_en: About Kafka...

t_ch: 已知的「星核猎手」有五人，首领艾利欧从不出面，大多数行动都是卡芙卡主使的。
t_en: There are five known members of the Stellaron Hunters. Elio is their leader, but always stays behind the scenes. Most of the operations are led by Kafka.

t_ch: 若非太卜司捕捉到了加密通信，恐怕此人还能隐藏更久。
t_en: Had the Divination Commission not intercepted her encrypted transmission, she would have remained undetected for much longer.

t_ch: 一旦抓住星核猎手…
t_en: Once we catch the Stellaron Hunter...

t_ch: 一旦抓住星核猎手，就交给我们。
t_en: Bring her to us.

t_ch: 卡芙卡有控制他人的能力。
t_en: Kafka is good at controlling the people around her.

t_ch: 卡芙卡什么都不会说的。
t_en: Kafka won't say anything.

t_ch: 嗯，寻常的手段许是不好使，不过，我们太卜司有独门的办法……
t_en: Hmm, ordinary means may prove futile when it comes to this individual. But the Divination Commission has ways of...

t_ch: …哈哈，别误会。仙舟不会虐待嫌犯，问讯情报也未必要倚靠暴力手段。
t_en: ...Haha, don't misunderstand me. The Xianzhou does not engage in torture. Retrieving intel does not necessarily involve the use of violence.

t_ch: 总之，交给我们就好。所获的情报，我会毫无保留地同各位分享。
t_en: In any case, you can deliver her directly to us. Once we learn something, I will share every piece of information with you.

t_ch: 我没有别的问题了。
t_en: I don't have any other questions.

t_ch: 如果进展顺利，希望日后有时间与诸位聊聊星海间的见闻。我受俗务所困，已经多年没有出行远航了。
t_en: If things go as planned, I would love to find the time to sit with all of you and hear about your experiences among the stars. My responsibilities to the Xianzhou have meant that I haven't had the chance to travel in many years.

t_ch: 列车久无消息，如今看到它再度驰骋星海，重回正轨，真是令人畅怀啊。
t_en: We had heard nothing of the Express for a long time. It is heartening to learn of its continued journey along that starward track.

t_ch: 我还有其他要事，不克久留，告辞了。
t_en: I have other matters to attend to. Goodbye for now.

t_ch: 这个景元…不简单哪。
t_en: Hmm, I think we only scratched the surface of this General Jing Yuan...

t_ch: 杨叔觉得有古怪？
t_en: Do you think there's something strange about him?

t_ch: 古怪倒也谈不上，只是总觉得哪里不大对劲。
t_en: I don't know about "strange," but my gut tells me something is off.

t_ch: 这个景元有些可疑…
t_en: He seems suspicious...

t_ch: 哦？我想听听你的看法。
t_en: Oh? Care to elaborate?

t_ch: 为何不让「我们」调查星核？
t_en: Why would he stop us from investigating the Stellaron?

t_ch: 他说这是仙舟内部事务，不容其他势力插手。理由确实站得住脚。
t_en: He says he doesn't want outsiders getting involved in the Xianzhou's internal affairs, which is understandable.

t_ch: 为何让「我们」搜捕卡芙卡？
t_en: Why did he ask us to go after Kafka?

t_ch: 啊！对，没错，就是这里！违和感就出自这里……
t_en: Yes! There's something about this point...

t_ch: 为何表现得这么亲切随和？
t_en: Why is he being so kind to us?

t_ch: 先是驭空对我们横加打压，再是将军出场谈笑风生，一下就让我们对他起了好感。
t_en: He wants us to trust him. He took advantage of Yukong's frosty reception to play the good guy.

t_ch: 他不是站在我们这边吗？
t_en: I thought he was on our side?

t_ch: 是这样没错，但总觉得哪里不大对劲。
t_en: Theoretically, yes. But something feels off.

t_ch: 我想到了！有一个奇怪的地方，非常微小——他刻意跳过了「刃」！
t_en: Ah, that's it! A minor detail, but curious. He avoided talking about Blade!

t_ch: 既然云骑军抓住了星核猎手的成员，以此为线索追捕卡芙卡就行了。何必要请我们「引出」卡芙卡？
t_en: Since the Cloud Knights have already captured a Stellaron Hunter, why not use him to get to Kafka? Why rely on us?

t_ch: 仙舟既不愿让外人插手「星核」灾害，又为何在「星核猎手」一事上如此大度？
t_en: The Xianzhou is reluctant to involve outsiders in the Stellaron disaster, so why is it so keen on letting us capture a Stellaron Hunter?

t_ch: 难道刃不在他们手里？
t_en: Could Blade have escaped?

t_ch: 关于星核，景元说了谎？
t_en: Do you think Jing Yuan lied about the Stellaron?

t_ch: 这是把我们当钓饵用呢…
t_en: He's using us as bait...

t_ch: 对，我只能想到一个合理的解释：不论「刃」被捕一事是否属实，至少现在，「刃」很可能已经脱离了仙舟的掌控。
t_en: Yes. The only sensible conclusion I can draw is that Blade had already escaped when Jing Yuan spoke to us — provided they even captured him in the first place.

t_ch: 因此，景元如果想钓出星核猎手，就只有我们这个与卡芙卡产生联系的诱饵。
t_en: Therefore, given our connection to Kafka, we represent the only way of luring the Stellaron Hunters in.

t_ch: 所以他才拐着弯地请我们帮忙——因为「刃」的逃脱不能让别人知道！
t_en: That's why he asked for our help... He didn't want to let anyone else find out that Blade had already escaped!

t_ch: 想通了这一节，也许我们开始接近事件的核心了。
t_en: Now that we've figured that out, perhaps we can get closer to the core of what's happening here.

t_ch: 这个景元，他到底掌握了哪些信息，哪些又是故意隐藏起来的呢？
t_en: This Jing Yuan... how much does he know, and how much is he hiding from us?

t_ch: 仙舟的将军亲自支持我们！这回可不会——等等，上次是不是也这样？要是他们安排咱们住店，可得小心！
t_en: We've got a Xianzhou general on our side! This time we have to... wait, does this seem familiar to you? Let's hope he doesn't offer us a hotel!

t_ch: 既然将军有令，天舶司自当全力配合。星核猎手的调查就托付给各位了。星槎海各处设施的通行凭证，我会一并开具，方便你们行事。
t_en: Seeing as the general gave the order, the Sky-Faring Commission will lend you our full support. The Stellaron Hunter investigation is in your hands now. I'll issue you a pass so you can access the facilities around Starskiff Haven.

t_ch: 至于人手…各个空港目前正处于维护和修复中，人力捉襟见肘。我只能请停云暂代接引的职责，照顾各位在这段时间内的行程。
t_en: As for personnel... the skyports are currently all under maintenance, so we're thinly stretched. What I can do is send Tingyun as your guide — she'll take care of you during your stay.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}觉得这个景元将军怎么样？
t_en: What do you make of this Jing Yuan?

t_ch: 长得不错。
t_en: He's pretty handsome.

t_ch: 谁问你长相啦！虽然确实不错……
t_en: I'm not asking about that! Although, you're not wrong...

t_ch: 我觉得这个人比那个驭空好说话多了，要么说人家能当仙舟将军，她只能做个司舵呢？你看这待人接物，差距多大。
t_en: He's much easier to talk to than that Yukong — their attitudes are so different! Maybe that's why she's only a helm master and he's a general...

t_ch: 可以信任。
t_en: Trustworthy.

t_ch: 我也觉得。这个人比那个驭空好说话多了，要么说人家能当仙舟将军，她只能做个司舵呢？你看这待人接物，差距多大。
t_en: I feel the same. He's much easier to talk to than that Yukong — their attitudes are so different! Maybe that's why she's only a helm master and he's a general...

t_ch: 有些可疑。
t_en: Suspicious.

t_ch: 你好像看谁都有点可疑…{F#是女生的第六感嘛？}{M#是你想太多了吧。}
t_en: {F#You think everyone's suspicious... though they do say some girls have a sixth sense.}{M#Come on, you think everyone's suspicious...}

t_ch: 我觉得这个人比那个驭空好说话多了，要么说人家能当仙舟将军，她只能做个司舵呢？你看这待人接物，差距多大。
t_en: He's much easier to talk to than that Yukong — their attitudes are so different! Maybe that's why she's only a helm master and he's a general...

t_ch: 太卜大人，我与他们的谈话你都听见了，有何看法？
t_en: Master Diviner, you heard our discussion. What do you make of it?

t_ch: 什么看法？「天道昭邈，人心幽微」，你要我给这几位卜一卦，占测来意吉凶么？
t_en: What do I make of it? "The way of heaven is apparent, but the heart of humanity is often deceptive." Are you asking me to divine their true intentions?

t_ch: 这倒不必，星穹列车与此事无干，这我十拿九稳。你我不必深究他们的来意，只要饵吞下，鱼钓出，也就够了。
t_en: That won't be necessary. The crew has nothing to do with the incident, of that I am almost certain. It isn't their intentions that trouble me. All I want is for them to lure out the one we're after.

t_ch: 这是我的提议吧，将军。
t_en: Wasn't that my idea, general?

t_ch: 嗯，多得有符卿智珠在握，之后的事情，也全都仰仗你了。
t_en: Indeed, your counsel has always been of great help to me. You may use your discretion on the matters ahead of us.

t_ch: 哼，那你倒是早些退位啊。
t_en: Hmph, why don't you retire early and I use my discretion full-time?

t_ch: 还不是时候，万一有甚变数，我得在将军之位上承担罪责，可不能现在一走了之，陷符卿于不义呀。
t_en: It is still too soon, unfortunately. If something goes wrong, you'll need a general to take the blame. How could I simply walk away and put you at such risk?

t_ch: 你早将星核猎手交到我手里，眼下也没这烦恼。
t_en: If you'd brought me that Blade earlier, none of this would've been necessary.

t_ch: 你到底在想什么啊？景元！该不会…难道是你故意把人放跑的？！
t_en: Wait, what are you up to exactly? Jing Yuan, did you... let him escape on purpose!?

t_ch: 我？我又怎能像符卿一样未卜先知？云骑军看守不力，我有责任。
t_en: Me? I had no idea he might escape! Unlike you, my gaze never travels beyond the horizon. I take full responsibility — the Cloud Knights failed in their duty.

t_ch: 哼，我能理解。仙舟诸务繁杂，你难免精力不济。要不是有我在底下撑着……
t_en: Hmph, I can understand. There's a lot to take care of on the Xianzhou — you were bound to miss something. Thank goodness I'm here...

t_ch: 说来，下次「六御」议政，你该履行举荐我继任将军的诺言了吧……
t_en: On that note, perhaps it's about time you finally nominate me as your successor when the Six Charioteers next convene...

t_ch: 嗯嗯嗯，好好好，知道了，我还有要事。之后就全拜托「天赋异禀」的符卿了。
t_en: Yes, yes, yes... I have to go now — I'll leave this in your overwhelmingly capable hands, Fu Xuan.

t_ch: 仙舟上的麻烦，桌案上的文牍，花坛里的杂草，唯有这三样东西是无论怎么努力也打扫不干净啊。
t_en: *sigh* There are three things in the world that I can't seem to rid myself of: The troubles of the Xianzhou, the papers on my desk, and the weeds in my garden.

t_ch: 将军，符太卜想接您的位置，路人皆知。
t_en: General, Diviner Fu wants the general's position for herself. Everyone knows that.

t_ch: 她是很有能力啦，不过心智上还要再磨磨，什么时候磨去了直脾性，我大概会考虑退休吧。
t_en: She is very capable, but her intellect is burdened by a quick temper. I'll retire when she's achieved a better balance.

t_ch: 星核这事，说麻烦也不麻烦。人跑了，再抓回来就是。将军一声令下，我彦卿立刻替您排忧解难。
t_en: This Stellaron thing is easy. Blade escaped, now we gotta go get him. Just say the word and I'll solve this in a flash.

t_ch: 我知你心急，想做些什么，并且做成些什么，但现在还不是时候。你欲得「剑首」之名，不可随意动手，尤其不可与重犯械斗。
t_en: I can understand your impatience, and I know you want to prove yourself. Now is not the time. If you truly wish to become Sword Champion, you shouldn't be running around brandishing your sword at people, especially not a major criminal.

t_ch: 将军难道以为我会输给那个「刃」不成？
t_en: Tsk, you think I'd lose to Blade?

t_ch: 我是要你耐下性子，彦卿。仙舟治平与剑术不同，徐徐图之，方能成势。何况这棋局中的暗手还没揭开呢……
t_en: I'm saying you need to have patience, Yanqing. Governing Xianzhou is different from a sword fight. The only way to build momentum is to work slowly. Besides, we still don't know who's really moving the chess pieces...

t_ch: 有一个疑团，只要它还没解开，这局棋就只能僵持不动。那就是「星核」。
t_en: There is something we must take care of before making our next move. As long it remains unresolved, we're at a stalemate. That something is the Stellaron.

t_ch: 它如何掩人耳目，绕过天舶司的核查与太卜司的推演，又被置于何处？
t_en: How did it manage to bypass the Sky-Faring Commission's inspections and the Divination Commission's predictions? Where is it now?

t_ch: 我看，把两个星核猎手都抓回来送去符太卜那儿一审是最快的法子。
t_en: I say we bring those two Stellaron Hunters before Diviner Fu — she'll get an answer out of them in no time.

t_ch: 这件事我已托了列车上的客人去做。不忙，之后大局底定，自有你的用武之地。
t_en: I've asked our friends from the Express to take care of that for us. Worry not, you'll have your moment when the current stalemate is broken.

t_ch: 你是我最信任的人，有些事，我只有交给你才放心。彦卿，有个差事……
t_en: You are my most trusted aide, and there are some things that I would only assign to you. Speaking of which, Yanqing...

t_ch: 这孩子……
t_en: *sigh* That boy...

t_ch: 是我不好，少年在家里待久了，难免要生出些事情来。「匣中久藏三尺水，何日可待试锋芒？」…呵呵……
t_en: I suppose it is my fault. I should have given him an opportunity already. "A sharp sword can't stay sheathed forever," haha...

t_ch: 只怕这次要受的挫折，大过他的洋洋意气呵……
t_en: My fear is that this might prove too big a setback, bigger than his exuberance...

t_ch: 唉，驭空大人把接待各位的任务又派给了我。
t_en: *sigh* Madam Yukong has asked me to look after you.

t_ch: 看来小女子和恩公们的缘分不浅呢。
t_en: Seems like we were destined to be in each other's company...

t_ch: 天舶司订了「浥尘客栈」的上房。恩公们办完这里的事情，就请随我一起去旅店里喝杯茶，暂作歇息吧。
t_en: The Sky-Faring Commission has reserved rooms for you at the Petrichor Inn. When you finish your business here, how about some tea together?

t_ch: 真是辛苦你了…
t_en: Thank you so much...

t_ch: 客气客气，各位下回见到驭空大人，替小女子美言几句便是最好的安慰了。我已经接受了我的劳碌命。
t_en: Not at all, though I'd appreciate it if you mention to Madam Yukong that you got a warm reception from me when you next see her. *sigh* Better to be busy than idle, I suppose.

t_ch: 你很不情愿啊…
t_en: You seem reluctant...

t_ch: 没有没有…各位下回见到驭空大人，替小女子美言几句便是最好的奖赏了。我已经接受了我的劳碌命。
t_en: No, no, though I'd appreciate it if you mention to Madam Yukong that you got a warm reception from me when you next see her. *sigh* Better to be busy than idle, I suppose.

t_ch: 刚接见就住宿？又来一次？
t_en: A hotel? Again?

t_ch: 冷静，别有这么强的应激反应。
t_en: Easy, I know this probably brings back bad memories.

t_ch: 一看到旅馆招牌，倦意就止不住地涌上来了。
t_en: *yawn* Well, here we are. I feel sleepy already.

t_ch: 天还大亮着呢。
t_en: The sun hasn't gone down yet.

t_ch: 我们忙里忙外这么久，怎么天还亮着啊？在司辰宫里我都以为过去老半天了。
t_en: What? But we've done a whole day's work — what's the sun playing at? It felt like we spent the whole day in the Palace of Astrum.

t_ch: 你哪回不是这样…
t_en: Ready for a nap? That's not like you, March...

t_ch: 这回不一样！我可是随时紧绷着，观察情况准备开溜。
t_en: Hey, that's not fair! My eyes are peeled this time — I'll make a run for it the second things go wrong.

t_ch: 不瞒你们说，刚才我看到那位驭空眉头一皱，差点以为周围要冲出一队全副武装的士兵，要把咱们几个押进大牢。
t_en: Jokes aside, did you see Madam Yukong frown at us? I thought her guards were about to jump out of nowhere and throw us in jail.

t_ch: 和大人物打交道，可比对付怪物还累人……
t_en: *sigh* I'd rather deal with monsters than these big shots...

t_ch: 啊，我、我可不是在说驭空大人的坏话……
t_en: Ah! I—I mean... not that Madam Yukong doesn't have her merits, hehe...

t_ch: 放心吧，小女子不是乱嚼舌根的人～
t_en: Don't worry, my lips are sealed~

t_ch: 不过身为属下，我要替大人说句公道话：眼下的罗浮危机四伏，驭空大人率领的天舶司肩负着仙舟关口的安全，警惕戒备是她的天职所在。
t_en: But as her subordinate, I have to say that it's Madam Yukong's duty to keep her guard up. The Luofu is facing a crisis, and as head of the Sky-Faring Commission, she is responsible for the security of the Xianzhou's customs and borders.

t_ch: 私底下，她老人家也不是这么不近人情的啦。
t_en: She's actually a very reasonable old girl in private.

t_ch: 老人家？
t_en: Old girl?

t_ch: 也不是，这么，不近人情？
t_en: Reasonable? Are we thinking of the same person?

t_ch: 据说这位大人当年可是仙舟云骑军飞行士中的佼佼者呢～脾气火辣，技术一流，爱笑爱闹。
t_en: They say that many years ago, Madam Yukong was an ace pilot in the Cloud Knights. She was a "work hard, play harder" type, known for her hot temper and incredible skill.

t_ch: 只是嘛，岁月蹉跎，最终王牌飞行士还是收住脾气心性，成了总辖一司的首领，要滴水不漏地收拾各种麻烦。
t_en: Eventually, she became the head of the entire commission, which required her to learn patience and adopt a meticulous approach to her work.

t_ch: 这不，驭空大人亲自吩咐我，为各位安排好浥尘客栈的上房以及日常花销用度，希望各位能在这里住得舒心，吃得开心～这样一来，仙舟也算是没有失了待客的礼数。
t_en: In any case, Madam Yukong instructed me to reserve the best rooms at the inn and have all your expenses covered. She wants to extend the full courtesy of the Xianzhou so that all of you enjoy your stay to the fullest~

t_ch: 同时她还吩咐，要是各位瞧见什么喜欢的，想吃的，跟老板说，全都记在天舶司的账上。
t_en: She specifically mentioned that if you wish to buy anything at the inn, be it food or otherwise, just let the innkeeper know. The commission will cover the cost.

t_ch: 还不快说声多谢驭空姐！
t_en: Say thanks to Madam Yukong for us!

t_ch: 你先说！
t_en: Why don't you go back yourself?

t_ch: 「都记在天舶司的账上」！
t_en: The commission will cover the cost!

t_ch: 真是我抵达仙舟以来听到的，最亲切的一句话了！
t_en: That's the friendliest thing I've heard since we arrived!

t_ch: 咳咳，遇到这样热情好客的主人，不好好享受一下真对不起人家的一番心意啊。对吧，杨叔？
t_en: Ahem! S—Seeing as our hosts are so thoughtful, I guess we should help ourselves. Right, Mr. Yang?

t_ch: 还是把注意力放在正事上吧。既然驭空司舵极力拒绝我们介入，想来天舶司对卡芙卡的下落多少有些头绪？
t_en: We should focus on our objective first. Seeing as Helm Master Yukong was extremely reluctant to get us involved, am I right to speculate that the Sky-Faring Commission has some leads on the whereabouts of Kafka?

t_ch: 恩公明察。嫌犯十分狡猾，除去加密频段外，通信的时间也卡得刚好，无法准确定位。
t_en: Exactly right. The suspect is extremely cunning. She encrypted her transmission and timed her communication — we couldn't pinpoint her exact location.

t_ch: 不过嘛，还是给太卜司找到了一点蛛丝马迹。
t_en: But as cunning as she is, the Divination Commission has managed to find something.

t_ch: 坐标在这里，一切交由你们自己决定。
t_en: Here are the coordinates. It's up to you how to proceed.

t_ch: 虽然追求的目标截然不同，但群星的轨道终将彼此交汇。再见。
t_en: Our destinations may differ, but the orbits of the stars will eventually converge. See you later.

t_ch: 这话有什么特别的吗？
t_en: Is there anything special about what she said?

t_ch: 恩公莫要被她的话引走了注意。
t_en: Don't let her words distract you.

t_ch: 坐标？轨道交汇？
t_en: Coordinates? Converge?

t_ch: 恩公莫要被她的话引走了注意。
t_en: Don't let her words distract you.

t_ch: 她说话时有什么声响。
t_en: I heard something in the background.

t_ch: 正是。
t_en: Precisely.

t_ch: 话音的背后，是某种装置运转的声响。
t_en: That's the sound of a device.

t_ch: 啊，有了这线索，局势就——毫无变化！仙舟可是一艘星舰哎，机器装置到处都是！
t_en: Ahhhh, which means... what exactly!? This is a starship! There are all kinds of devices making weird noises.

t_ch: 三月小姐，对于大部分人来说，这种响动也许毫无区别。但对负责维护设施的工造司来说，每一种机械的运转都像曲子的旋律高低各有不同了。
t_en: Miss March, to the untrained ear, these noises may sound the same. But for the craftsmen of the Artisanship Commission, each machine has a different pitch and melody.

t_ch: 将军召来了匠人，在比对辨听之下，发现卡芙卡的背景音来自「迴星港」的造船设施。
t_en: The general sent for craftsmen, and they concluded that the sound came from the shipyard facilities in Stargazer Navalia.

t_ch: 请各位稍事休息，养足精神。准备就绪便可出发擒贼，届时就看恩公们的手段啦～
t_en: Now, get some rest and prepare yourselves for the operation ahead. I look forward to seeing you in action~

t_ch: 大家先休息片刻，追踪星核猎手卡芙卡，必然是一场硬仗。
t_en: Let's take advantage of the rest. It won't be easy to track down Kafka the Stellaron Hunter.

t_ch: 对了，{NICKNAME}，咱们跟列车报个平安吧～
t_en: Oh, let's let the Express know how we're doing~

t_ch: 尤其是丹恒，嘿嘿，你问他在干嘛，然后告诉他我们这儿可好玩了！
t_en: More importantly, let's see how Dan Heng's doing! Hee-hee, ask him what he's up to — then tell him we're having loads of fun!

t_ch: （发短信给丹恒）
t_en: (Text Dan Heng)

t_ch: （先等一等）
t_en: (Maybe later)

t_ch: 恩公何事？
t_en: How can I help?

t_ch: 我想起一件事。
t_en: There's something I want to say.

t_ch: 嗯？但问无妨。
t_en: Oh? Let's hear it.

t_ch: 截获通信时，仙舟上在下雨吗？
t_en: Was it raining when Kafka's transmission was intercepted?

t_ch: 卡芙卡在通讯时拿着伞…
t_en: Kafka was holding an umbrella in her transmission...

t_ch: 恩公观察得挺仔细嘛。仙舟上风云雨雾都是机巧造景，受地衡司风雨台的调遣。
t_en: How perceptive. Our wind, clouds, rain, and fog are all artificial. The Realm-Keeping Commission's weather pavilion manages the environmental conditions here.

t_ch: 卡芙卡撑着伞，意味着通信时她所在的地方正巧被人工雨云覆盖。
t_en: If Kafka was holding an umbrella, that means she was in an area with artificial rainfall during the transmission.

t_ch: 不过光有这一节也不能说明什么，毕竟仙舟上不止一处洞天，当时降雨的地方也不止一处。
t_en: Still, that doesn't help us much. The ship is huge, with changing conditions across various delves. I'm sure there were showers across many of them at the time.

t_ch: 卡芙卡还会停留在迴星港吗？
t_en: Any chance Kafka is still at Stargazer Navalia?

t_ch: 这可说不准。原本太卜司能调取每个洞天间的出入文牍来进行追踪……
t_en: Impossible to say. It used to be that the Divination Commission could track the access history of all the delves...

t_ch: 不过眼下星核降临，一切都乱了套。有些洞天甚至连出入口都发生了错位。
t_en: But with the arrival of the Stellaron, things have become messy. Some delves even had their entrance marked as the exit.

t_ch: 我若是星核猎手，这样的混乱正中下怀，虽说增加了趁乱逃脱的难度，但更不易被发现了。
t_en: If I were one of the Stellaron Hunters, I'd be very happy to capitalize on all the chaos. It'd be harder to escape, but easier to blend in.

t_ch: 没什么…
t_en: Never mind...

t_ch: 请您停步。将军有令，暂时封锁星槎海部分区域，以防危险发生。
t_en: Halt. Under order of the general and to mitigate further risk, Starskiff Haven is under partial lockdown.

t_ch: 抱歉，前方禁止通行。按云骑军巡防令，我们正在排查风险地区。
t_en: I'm sorry, but this route is closed. We're conducting inspections in accordance with the Cloud Knights patrol ordinance.

t_ch: 前面的区域……不是，前方区域目前正在接受封锁排查，暂时禁止通行。
t_en: How about we explore the area ahea... I mean, the area ahead is currently under lockdown and inspection. This route is closed for the time being.

s_ch: 严肃但礼貌的云骑士兵
s_en: Serious but Polite Cloud Knights Soldier
t_ch: 前方戒严，禁止通行！
t_en: A lockdown has been imposed up ahead! No passage will be permitted!

t_ch: 我家闺女还在等我…
t_en: My daughter is waiting for me at home...

t_ch: 这批货要砸手里了！
t_en: I'll lose money on this shipment!

t_ch: 请您通融一下吧…
t_en: Please find it in your heart to let me through...

t_ch: 请您让我过去吧，我家闺女还在家等我。
t_en: Please let me through. My daughter's waiting for me at home.

s_ch: 严肃但礼貌的云骑士兵
s_en: Serious but Polite Cloud Knights Soldier
t_ch: 对不起，请您谅解，前方禁止通行……
t_en: I'm sorry. Please understand, the road up ahead has been sealed off...

t_ch: 快让我过去！我这批货必须尽快卖出去！
t_en: Let me through now! I have to sell these goods on the double!

s_ch: 严肃但礼貌的云骑士兵
s_en: Serious but Polite Cloud Knights Soldier
t_ch: 请冷静一点，生命和生意哪个更重要？请您掂量清楚。
t_en: Please calm down. Which is more important: Your life, or your deal? Consider this carefully.

t_ch: 请您通融一下吧，我真的有急事，让我过去吧……
t_en: Please find it in your heart to let me through, I'm on urgent business. Please let me through...

s_ch: 严肃但礼貌的云骑士兵
s_en: Serious but Polite Cloud Knights Soldier
t_ch: 不行，请您谅解。不止您着急，大家都着急，怎么可能单单为您通融呢？
t_en: That won't be possible. Please understand. You're not the only one in a rush. Everyone is. How can I make an exception for you?

t_ch: 请留步！不可通行！
t_en: Hold! You can't go through here!

t_ch: 对不起，请您留步。目前情况复杂，局势尚未明朗，因此我们不得不封锁各区域。
t_en: My apologies, please stay where you are. The situation is complicated, and we currently do not have a clear view of the situation. We have had no choice but to seal this area off.

t_ch: 有事要办的话，还请您在局势稳定后再来吧。给您添麻烦了。
t_en: If you have business to attend to, please do it when the situation has settled down. Apologies for any trouble.

t_ch: 宣夜大道这么繁华…
t_en: Starwatcher Avenue is a bustling sight...

t_ch: 可惜我们过不去…
t_en: A pity we can't get through...

t_ch: 都会好起来的。
t_en: It will get better.

t_ch: 但愿如此吧。
t_en: I certainly hope so.

t_ch: 都戒严了，宣夜大道还是那么繁华…真不愧是仙舟。
t_en: That Starwatcher Avenue would be so crowded even with a lockdown... Xianzhou is really a sight to behold.

t_ch: 可惜我们只能远观，过不去。
t_en: It's a pity that we can only admire from afar.

t_ch: 没事的，很快就会好起来的。等解封了请你吃饭。
t_en: It's all right, it will get better very soon. I'll treat you to a meal when the lockdown is lifted.

t_ch: 哎，但愿如此吧。
t_en: *sigh* I certainly hope so.

t_ch: 封锁了，还发工资吗…
t_en: The area's been sealed off... are we still going to get paid...

t_ch: 这下日子怎么过啊…
t_en: How am I going to make ends meet...

t_ch: 哎…港口封锁了，还会不会发工资啊？
t_en: *sigh* The dock's been sealed off. Will we be getting our wages?

t_ch: 不知道。我看够呛，这么一闹，老板也没收入了啊……
t_en: No idea. I doubt it. The boss probably has no money to pay us, what with this fiasco...

t_ch: 可这样的话，解封之前我们该靠什么养活自己啊？
t_en: If this keeps up, how'll we survive then?

t_ch: 谁知道呢…哎，也不知道什么时候才能解封……
t_en: Who knows... *sigh* I wonder when the restrictions will be lifted...

t_ch: 好久没出这么大的事…
t_en: It's been a long time since something this serious happened...

t_ch: 仙舟一定能逢凶化吉！
t_en: Xianzhou will surely quell this crisis!

t_ch: 哎…仙舟可真是好久没出过这么大的乱子了……
t_en: *sigh* It's really been a long while since Xianzhou encountered something this serious...

t_ch: 嗯？您是游客吗？现在是非常时期，请您尽可能不要在外面闲逛，可能会遇到危险…哎，一定要注意安全啊！
t_en: Hm? Are you a traveler? These are unstable times right now. You should not be strolling around in the streets, or you might run into danger... Hey, keep yourself safe!

t_ch: 你是游客？别在外面乱晃了，快点回住处去吧。虽然我们仙舟云骑有自信保护你，但现在外面还是比较危险的。
t_en: Are you a traveler? You should avoid the outdoors and return to your lodging. We Xianzhou Cloud Knights may be able to protect you, but we cannot stress enough the dangers of being outdoors right now.

t_ch: 无论如何，别担心，也别害怕！只要有我们在，仙舟就一定能够逢凶化吉。
t_en: In any case, worry not, and don't be afraid! As long as we're around, Xianzhou will surely tide over this crisis.

t_ch: 现在情况如何？
t_en: How are things going at the moment?

t_ch: 不太乐观…
t_en: I'm not very optimistic...

t_ch: 驭空大人正在调度。
t_en: Madam Yukong is tweaking it.

t_ch: 也难为她了…
t_en: What a hassle for her...

t_ch: 由于云骑军的排查和警戒工作，此处挤满了人，你暂时无法通行。
t_en: Due to the Cloud Knights' security regulations, this place is overcrowded with people. For the time being, you can't squeeze past.

t_ch: 抱歉，此处暂时被封锁了，请另行寻找通路。
t_en: Sorry, this place has been sealed off. Please go another way around.

t_ch: 这儿暂时不让通行，要请您走别的路了。
t_en: This place is temporarily closed off. Please use another route.

t_ch: 您好，我受命把守此处的进出。您可以换走别的路。
t_en: Hello, I've been assigned to guard the entrance here. You can take another route.

t_ch: 闲谈落定，瓦尔特暗暗对你比了个手势。你明白，下面是列车团自己的谈话时间。
t_en: The chat concluded, and Welt shot you a covert gesture. You understand that this is the Crew's own discussion time.

t_ch: 恩公，就在这儿下船吧～
t_en: Let's disembark here, benefactors.

t_ch: …本座平日虽深居简出，治下是何模样还是认得的。
t_en: ...I may live in relative seclusion, but I can recognize my own territory.

t_ch: 你带的这是什么路？！太卜司所在是这里么？！
t_en: Why did you bring us here!? Does this look like the Divination Commission to you!?

t_ch: 啊哟，太卜息怒！穹仪失灵了，定位洞天的入口可不容易。小女子也想把事情办利索些，可眼下能停靠星槎的也就只有这儿啦。
t_en: ...No need to yell, Master Diviner! The Meridian Pin is malfunctioning and I couldn't find the entrance to the delve. I wanted to get us straight to our destination but this is the only place I could dock the starskiff.

t_ch: 您瞧：「长乐天」——一看就知是个安全地界。剩下的路，咱们就多走几步嘛。
t_en: Look — "Exalting Sanctum" — this is a safe place. Let's just walk the rest of the way from here.

t_ch: 哼。
t_en: Hmph.

t_ch: 卦象涨落，兑坎之间。行舟困顿，泥足不前……
t_en: Our hexagrammatic position is fluctuating between the marsh and water trigrams. The vessel is stranded and the way is blocked...

t_ch: 倒是听说仙舟有什么「卜算」神技，这怎么就是手指比划？跟我数数一样。
t_en: I heard the Xianzhou can tell your fortune — is that how they do it? Anyone can count on their fingers...

t_ch: 这叫内行看门道，外行看热闹。
t_en: The connoisseur appreciates the artistry, and the layman enjoys the show.

t_ch: 是是是，咱是外行，你这个内行给我说说门道呗？
t_en: Yeah, yeah, yeah — so I'm a layman. Why don't you enlighten me, oh connoisseur?

t_ch: 这就是传说中的量子纠缠。
t_en: This must be the "quantum entanglement" you hear about in stories.

t_ch: 你这套东西早几百琥珀纪就不流行了！
t_en: That's been out of fashion for hundreds of Amber Eras!

t_ch: 你数数还用手指？
t_en: You count on your fingers?

t_ch: 干嘛！辅助一下嘛，十根指头不用也是浪费呀！
t_en: What's wrong with that? We've got ten fingers, may as well use them!

t_ch: 本座方才占了一卦，卦象所示与现状无差。看来今日不可乘星槎直抵太卜司了，那厢也受星核作祟，出了点麻烦。唉，没了我坐镇，也不知司内乱成什么样子了……
t_en: I just performed some quick divination and the hexagram is consistent with our current predicament. The starskiff cannot take us to the Divination Commission today. Alas, without me in charge to handle the Stellaron crisis, I dare not even imagine the kind of mess the commission must be in.

t_ch: 是啊，想来太卜司一日也不可缺了符大人。
t_en: It's true — the Divination Commission really can't go a single day without Lady Fu.

t_ch: 那还是做好梯度建设吧，万一你要请个假啥的，怪麻烦的……
t_en: That's why you have to develop your talent pool — otherwise everything falls apart when you go on vacation...

t_ch: 本座谅二位不知内情，就不责怪方才的妄言了。先行一步准备问讯事宜，再见。
t_en: Hmph, since you are clearly ignorant of the commission's internal affairs, I shall absolve you of your ridiculous remarks. I'm going ahead to make some inquiries. Goodbye.

t_ch: 等等，我们可以帮忙。
t_en: Wait, we can help.

t_ch: 你们——还真是热心肠，难怪景元说可以随意差遣……
t_en: You... really are enthusiastic. No wonder Jing Yuan told me to give you errands...

t_ch: 卡芙卡怎么办？
t_en: What about Kafka?

t_ch: 人犯当然要寸步不离地跟着我，这是景元的命令。
t_en: The prisoner must follow me every step of the way. This is Jing Yuan's order.

t_ch: 山水有相逢！
t_en: We shall meet again!

t_ch: 咱这话可能不中听，但是——你们将军可是说好了，审讯卡芙卡时我们也得在场喔。
t_en: Um, you might not wanna hear this, but your general gave us his word. We have to be present when you question Kafka.

t_ch: 你们也忒小瞧本座，我一诺千金！便是洞天塌下来也一定守诺——当然了，此事的概率微可不计。
t_en: You think too little of me — my word is my bond! I will stick to my promise even if this delve collapses. That's... very unlikely, by the way.

t_ch: 要使这人犯「开口」，太卜司得用上特殊手段。事涉秘密，无法公开。请你们见谅，但本座发誓：即使准备就绪，不待各位到来，审讯绝不开始。
t_en: To have this prisoner speak, the commission must resort to unconventional means... the nature of which is confidential and cannot be disclosed — forgive me. But I can assure you that the questioning will not begin until you arrive, even if that means wasting precious time.

t_ch: 我已指派了一位门人在「长乐天」广场前等候，一旦内务整顿完成，便传令让接引人带各位进入太卜司，还请各位耐心逗留。
t_en: I have appointed someone to wait for you in front of Exalting Sanctum Plaza. Once we've consolidated our internal affairs, you will be brought into the Divination Commission. Please be patient.

t_ch: 知道啦，我相信你啦！
t_en: O—Okay, we trust you~!

t_ch: …我好像又惹人生气了。
t_en: ...I think I offended someone again.

t_ch: 得不到信任是很让人恼火。
t_en: She's just annoyed that you won't trust her.

t_ch: 哼，你又和她共情上啦？我也是怕她出尔反尔，想着提醒一句嘛。
t_en: Hey, are you on her side? I just wanted to remind her not to break her promise, that's all.

t_ch: 没办法，总得有人提醒她。
t_en: Well, someone had to put her in her place.

t_ch: 那下次你来吧，每次降好感的事都是我干……
t_en: Hmph, you do it next time — I'm tired of being the villain.

t_ch: 这还用好像？
t_en: You think?

t_ch: 就你话多！
t_en: Don't start!

t_ch: 别放在心上，三月。我觉得那位符玄姑娘挺通人情的，不会生你的气。
t_en: Don't take it to heart, March. Miss Fu Xuan seems like a reasonable lady — I'm sure she's not angry with you.

t_ch: 有吗？我怎么觉得她冷冰冰的……
t_en: Really? I thought she was pretty icy...

t_ch: 所谓外冷内热…
t_en: Some people are not what they seem.

t_ch: 这样啊…我对这种人不是很有办法。
t_en: Hmm... I don't know how to deal with people like that.

t_ch: 冷峻只是她的伪装。
t_en: I'm sure she's just putting on a tough front.

t_ch: 就好像沉默只是你的保护机制是吧？
t_en: Like how you're always pretending to be quiet?

t_ch: 和丹恒有一拼。
t_en: As icy as Dan Heng?

t_ch: 哈哈，丹恒才不是「冷」哩，他那叫「愣」。
t_en: Haha, Dan Heng's not icy. He's nerdy.

t_ch: 好啦，别拌嘴了。估计太卜司要准备挺长时间。我们先在附近走走吧。
t_en: Okay, enough chit-chat. I reckon the Divination Commission could be a while — let's take a look around.

t_ch: 好耶，刚刚坐的星槎就挺有意思。这个长乐天估计好玩的东西也不少～
t_en: Yeah! That starskiff was pretty cool, there must be loads of interesting things in Exalting Sanctum.

t_ch: 咦，好巧啊，恩公。
t_en: Hey, fancy seeing you here.

t_ch: 请问太卜司是做什么的？
t_en: What does the Divination Commission do?

t_ch: 唉…恩公可从来没问过小女子天舶司是做什么的。真真人比人，气死人；司比司，没意思……
t_en: *sigh* You never asked what the Sky-Faring Commission does. I suppose not all commissions are created equal...

t_ch: 好罢，恩公既问了，小女子回答就是：太卜司主掌仙舟的情报、运筹与卜算。
t_en: Anyway, if you must know, the Divination Commission is responsible for gathering intelligence, devising strategies, and performing divination.

t_ch: 卜算？靠卜算来审讯？
t_en: Divination? Trial by fortune-telling?

t_ch: 也许他们另有妙法呢？哈，太卜司的内务，我一个小小接渡使如何知晓～
t_en: Maybe there's more to it? It's not like I would know, I'm a mere Amicassador.

t_ch: 恩公且宽心。既然符太卜胸有成竹，您就瞧她表演便是。
t_en: Don't worry, Diviner Fu seems confident about getting Kafka to talk. If I were you I'd just sit back and watch her do her thing.

t_ch: 卜算？那不是碰运气吗？
t_en: Divination? Isn't that the same as flipping a coin?

t_ch: 恩公有所不知，仙舟的卜算之法可不是抛铜钱，抽木签之类的哄人玩意，而是名为「玉兆」的技术。
t_en: Oh no, Xianzhou divination is nothing like the superstitious scams you see elsewhere. It's based on a technology called the jade abacus.
